@zerohedge: Next: attention turns to the $1.8TN in shady accounting hidden liabilities (thanks SPVs): $1TN in purchase commitments $0.8TN in leases not yet started ... oh and $2TN in RPOs and throw in a little chip depreciation

@tracyalloway: The smart money is worried about all the AI companies that are being thinly built on top of foundational models that they don’t actually control: https://aijourn.com/the-ai-bubble-is-real-but-the-problem-isnt-what-you-think/
@unusual_whales: Visa, $V, and OpenAI are integrating Visa's payment network into ChatGPT to allow autonomous AI agents to make purchases online.
